response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled polyglot engineer with strong TypeScript/Node.js fundamentals and genuine interest in developer tooling, but the role requires deep JVM expertise, Kotlin proficiency, and hands-on Spring ecosystem experience — none of which are demonstrated in the resume. Java appears peripherally in the skills list and in brief mentions at two roles, but there is no evidence of enterprise Java development, JVM internals knowledge, or Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate usage. The closest IDE-adjacent experience cited (NI LabWindows/CVI) is a C-based IDE, not JVM-based tooling.
strengths: Genuine interest in language tooling and developer infrastructure, evidenced by Fluent-Asserts, Trial test runner, and MCP code generator work
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) consistently applied across multiple senior roles
Experience with high-throughput distributed systems (millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby), demonstrating comfort with complex, large-scale codebases
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin experience; Java usage appears minimal, brief, and not enterprise-focused across the entire career history
No evidence of Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or any JVM enterprise framework experience anywhere in the resume
Primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang — fundamentally misaligned with the JVM-centric core requirements of this role

key_factors.factor: Language tooling and developer infrastructure background
